CustomField.description: The 'loop' attribute specifies how many times you'd like the text repeated. The default is once. Specifying '0' will cause the <Say> verb to loop until either the call is hung up or 1,000 iterations are performed.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Specify how many times you'd like your audio to play on the recipient's phone (the default is once). Entering '0' will cause the audio to loop indefinitely until the recipient hangs up.
CustomField.label: Loop
